subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath unfurled His banners, manifested His signs, proclaimed His words, and made clear His evidences! He hath, verily, gladdened the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن نشر رایاته و اظهر ایاته و اعلن کلماته و اوضح بیناته قد شرح الصدور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
